# Jukka-Pekka Lappalainen

> Full Stack Developer based in Perttula, Finland

## About

Jukka-Pekka Lappalainen is an enthusiastic and experienced full-stack developer with a passion for creating innovative solutions. With a solid educational background in ICT from the University of Jyvaskyla, he has cultivated a diverse skill set spanning programming languages, frameworks, and problem-solving techniques.

Beyond programming, he brings a unique perspective to his work from extensive experience as a sound engineer, which has exposed him to both software and hardware aspects, fostering a disciplined approach to troubleshooting and problem-solving.

## Skills

- Programming: React, TypeScript, Python, Java
- Cloud: Amazon Web Services (AWS)
- Security: Ethical Hacking (Web, System)
- Audio: Audio Designing & Mixing (Ableton Live 10)

## Location

Perttula, Finland

## Education

University of Jyvaskyla — ICT

## Employment

Full Stack Developer
